mapper.insert: insert into kh_drug_remind_time (user_drug_id, schedule_time, quantity) values ( #{userDrugId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{scheduleTime,jdbcType=TIME}, #{quantity,jdbcType=NUMERIC} )
mapper.select: select user_drug_id, schedule_time, quantity, create_time, update_time from kh_drug_remind_time where user_drug_id=#{userDrugId,jdbcType=BIGINT} order by schedule_time
mapper.insert:
insert into kh_drug_remind_time (user_drug_id, schedule_time, quantity) values
( #{item.userDrugId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.scheduleTime,jdbcType=TIME}, #{item.quantity,jdbcType=NUMERIC} )
mapper.delete: delete from kh_drug_remind_time where user_drug_id in (select id from kh_user_drug where user_id=#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT})
